query:
UPDATE games 
SET 
  modelAwayScore = NULL, modelHomeScore = NULL,
  modelAwaySpread = NULL, modelHomeSpread = NULL,
  modelTotal = NULL,
  modelAwayML = NULL, modelHomeML = NULL,
  modelAwaySpreadOdds = NULL, modelHomeSpreadOdds = NULL,
  modelOverOdds = NULL, modelUnderOdds = NULL,
  modelOverPct = NULL, modelUnderPct = NULL,
  modelAwayWinPct = NULL, modelHomeWinPct = NULL,
  publishedModel = 0,
  modelEdges = NULL
WHERE sport = 'NCAAM'
  AND gameDate = '2026-03-19';

SELECT COUNT(*) as cleared FROM games 
WHERE sport = 'NCAAM' AND gameDate = '2026-03-19' AND publishedModel = 0;
